title: CleanSaturated
description: Make Your Game Smoother and saturated with a clean Gui and Adjustable Keybind.
body:
## 🌈 **Clean Saturated**

**Clean visuals. Smooth experience. Full control.**

Clean Saturated enhances your Minecraft visuals by giving you precise control over color saturation while keeping performance smooth and stable. Designed to be lightweight and simple, it improves how the game looks without adding unnecessary complexity.

### ✨ Features

* 🎨 Adjustable Saturation
  Fine-tune color intensity to make your world more vibrant or more natural.

* ⚡ Smooth Performance
  Optimized to keep your game running clean and lag-free.

* 🧼 Clean & Minimal GUI
  Easy-to-use interface for quick adjustments without clutter.

* ⌨️ Custom Keybinds
  Change settings on the fly with fully configurable keybinds.

* 🔧 Lightweight Design
  No unnecessary features — just what you need for better visuals.

### 🎯 Perfect For

* Players who want better-looking Minecraft without shaders
* Low-end PC users needing performance-friendly visual improvements
* Anyone who prefers a simple and clean UI experience


* Gui Bind - (K)
